name: io.github.ashmitrrr/dsa-tracker-mcp-server
description: MCP server for tracking DSA/LeetCode practice with spaced repetition. Ships with NeetCode 150, supports any custom problem list via JSON.

environmentVariables.description: Path to the SQLite database file (default: ~/.dsa_tracker_mcp/progress.db)
environmentVariables.name: DSA_TRACKER_DB

environmentVariables.description: Path to a JSON file with a custom problem list (default: uses built-in NeetCode 150)
environmentVariables.name: DSA_TRACKER_PROBLEMS_FILE
